# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

add_subdirectory(unittests)

add_library(library-cpp-resources)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-resources PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-resources PUBLIC
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  library-cpp-common
  library-cpp-misc
  yt-client-cache
  yt-client-hedging
  cpp-yt-misc
)

target_sources(library-cpp-resources PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/resources/resource_base.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/resources/yt_client_factory_detail.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/resources/yt_hedging_client_detail.cpp
)


add_global_library_for(library-cpp-resources.global
  library-cpp-resources)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-resources.global PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-resources.global PUBLIC
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  library-cpp-common
  library-cpp-misc
  yt-client-cache
  yt-client-hedging
  cpp-yt-misc
)

target_sources(library-cpp-resources.global PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/resources/register.cpp
)
